news.title: BPSemi Expands LED Driver Portfolio with High-PF Series
news.summary: BPSemi announces new high-power-factor LED driver series targeting commercial lighting applications with improved efficiency and dimming performance.
news.content:
BPSemi has expanded its LED driver portfolio with the introduction of the new BP3320 series, featuring enhanced power factor correction (PFC) performance and advanced dimming capabilities. The new series addresses the growing demand for high-efficiency commercial lighting solutions that meet stringent global energy regulations.

Key features of the BP3320 series include:
- Active PFC achieving >0.95 power factor
- Total harmonic distortion (THD) <10%
- Universal input voltage range (90V-305V AC)
- Multiple dimming options including 0-10V, PWM, and digital interfaces
- Output power range from 30W to 150W
- Compact form factor for space-constrained fixtures

The new drivers are designed for commercial applications including office lighting, retail environments, and hospitality settings where energy efficiency and lighting quality are critical.

As an authorized BPSemi distributor, LiTong provides comprehensive technical support for the new BP3320 series including reference designs, evaluation kits, and application engineering assistance. Contact our FAE team for product samples and design support.

news.title: BPSemi Achieves ISO 14001 Environmental Certification
news.summary: BPSemi receives ISO 14001 certification for environmental management, reinforcing commitment to sustainable manufacturing practices.
news.content:
BPSemi has successfully achieved ISO 14001:2015 certification for its environmental management system, demonstrating the company's commitment to sustainable business practices and environmental responsibility.

The certification covers BPSemi's design and manufacturing operations, recognizing the company's systematic approach to environmental management including:
- Resource efficiency and waste reduction programs
- Environmental impact assessment and mitigation
- Compliance with environmental regulations
- Continuous improvement in environmental performance
- Employee training and awareness programs

This achievement complements BPSemi's existing ISO 9001 quality management certification, further strengthening the company's position as a responsible semiconductor manufacturer.

LiTong, as an authorized distributor, supports BPSemi's environmental initiatives by promoting products that enable energy-efficient designs and sustainable applications. Our FAE team can help customers optimize their designs for maximum efficiency and minimal environmental impact.

news.title: BPSemi Launches New Quasi-Resonant Controller for High-Efficiency Adapters
news.summary: New BP3290 quasi-resonant PWM controller offers valley switching technology for improved efficiency in power adapter applications up to 100W.
news.content:
BPSemi has introduced the BP3290, a new quasi-resonant (QR) PWM controller designed for high-efficiency power adapter and power supply applications. The BP3290 features advanced valley switching technology that reduces switching losses and improves electromagnetic interference (EMI) performance.

Key specifications and features:
- Wide input voltage range: 85V-265V AC
- Maximum output power: 100W
- Valley switching for reduced switching losses
- Frequency foldback for light-load efficiency
- Built-in synchronous rectification control
- Comprehensive protection features (OVP, OCP, OTP, SCP)
- Low standby power: <30mW
- Multiple package options

The BP3290 is ideal for applications requiring high efficiency across wide load ranges, including:
- USB-C PD adapters
- Notebook power supplies
- Gaming console power adapters
- Industrial power supplies

LiTong provides complete technical support for the BP3290 including reference designs, transformer specifications, and application guidance. Contact our team for evaluation samples and design assistance.

news.title: LiTong Expands Partnership with BPSemi to Include Full Product Portfolio
news.summary: LiTong strengthens distribution partnership with BPSemi, now offering complete product lines including LED drivers, power management ICs, and motor drivers.
news.content:
LiTong is pleased to announce the expansion of its distribution partnership with BPSemi (晶丰明源), now covering the complete BPSemi product portfolio. This expanded partnership enables LiTong to provide customers with comprehensive access to BPSemi's industry-leading analog and power management solutions.

The expanded portfolio includes:
- LED Lighting Drivers: Complete range from low-power bulbs to high-power commercial fixtures
- AC/DC Power Management: Controllers for adapters, chargers, and auxiliary power supplies
- DC/DC Converters: Buck and boost converters for various voltage conversion needs
- Motor Drivers: Solutions for DC motors, stepper motors, and BLDC motors

LiTong's value-added services for BPSemi products include:
- Technical support from experienced FAE team
- Reference design evaluation and customization
- Design review and optimization services
- Inventory management and supply chain support
- Training programs and workshops

Contact LiTong for product information, samples, and technical support for all BPSemi products.
